category_sources: Official repository description is S3 benchmarking tool.
source_facts.description says it is an S3 benchmarking tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository is minio/warp and presents Warp as the MinIO S3 benchmarking tool.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, and the README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/minio/warp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists warp as a CLI executable.
